outlook.summary: Market consolidating below key WEEKLY resistance at 23900. Strong multi-expiry support exists at 23400 (RESONANCE). Zero total GEX indicates gamma-neutral zone with potential for directional breakout. Monthly PCR of 14.50 suggests heavy put hedging creating structural floor. Reverse smirk in monthly indicates call premium - bullish bias for swing trades.

levels.motivazione: Highest volume concentration (535 VOL) in WEEKLY expiration above spot. Primary dealer resistance level capping upside. Spot only 0.18% below this level.
RESONANCE level - significant volume across ALL 3 expirations: 0DTE (255 VOL - highest), WEEKLY (5 VOL), MONTHLY (22 VOL). Multi-expiry confluence creates strong structural support.
CONFLUENCE level - second highest WEEKLY volume (220 VOL) with 0DTE presence (6 VOL). Secondary support zone below RESONANCE.
Part of major MONTHLY resistance cluster (24400-24600) with 54 VOL. Upside target zone for swing trades. Significant call interest indicates dealer hedging resistance.
Present across all expirations with moderate volume. Acts as friction zone near spot (0.66% below). Dealer delta hedging creates choppy price action.
Structural gamma equilibrium point. Far below spot (9.9%) but critical for market structure. If breached, indicates regime change to dealer short-gamma volatility amplification.
